message:
fix(bubbletea): Always include action in MouseMsg Display output

- Updated MouseMsg Display impl to always append action (e.g., "left press"
  instead of "left") for non-wheel button events
- Added #![allow(dead_code)] to bubbles, wish conformance test modules
  for fixture structs where not all fields are used
- Added #![allow(unused_imports)] to wish conformance tests
- Updated related unit tests and conformance tests to match Go behavior
- Fixed formatting in comparison.rs via cargo fmt

Fixes 7 mouse_event conformance test failures that expected "left press",
"right press", etc. but got "left", "right".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
